name: loopy-oss
description: Connect Claude Cowork to your self-hosted Loopy OSS instance. Register agents, create loops, emit signals, and manage your team — no cloud required.
author: LoopyThinking

skills.name: loopy-oss-bridge
skills.description: Setup, agent registration, and org context

skills.name: loopy-oss-loop-mapper
skills.description: Translate work into loops (Work Signal → Loop pipeline)

skills.name: loopy-oss-signal-emit
skills.description: Emit a signal to an existing loop

skills.name: loopy-oss-ipl-tracker
skills.description: Summarise IPL hours liberated by agents

LOOPY_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of your Loopy OSS API (without trailing slash)

LOOPY_AGENT_TOKEN.description: Agent token returned by POST /agents. Set after first registration.
